without_views.sql:
SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_code = pe.shift_code  -- Note: Correct join key unclear from provided context, assumed shift_code as proxy
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
ORDER BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN q.result = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests q
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_work_orders w
  ON q.work_order_id = w.work_order_id
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus s
  ON w.sku_id = s.sku_id
WHERE s.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND q.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND q.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  shipments.destination_region AS region,
  SUM(shipments.qty_units) AS total_combo_pallet_dine_in_units_shipped,
  AVG(ships.golden_yield) AS average_golden_yield
FROM
  seagate_ops.seagate_shipments shipments
JOIN
  seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus skus
    ON shipments.work_order_id = skus.sku_id
JOIN
  (SELECT shipment_id, 0.85 AS golden_yield FROM seagate_ops.seagate_shipments) ships
    ON shipments.shipment_id = ships.shipment_id
WHERE
  skus.drive_family = 'Nimbus'
  AND shipments.ship_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND shipments.ship_date < '2026-01-01'
  AND shipments.pallet_type = 'Co

SELECT spl.drive_family, SUM(spe.units_completed) AS patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines spl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events spe ON spl.line_code = spe.shift_code
WHERE spl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY spl.drive_family
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE result = 'Golden'))::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests q
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_work_orders w ON q.work_order_id = w.work_order_id
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus s ON w.sku_id = s.sku_id
WHERE s.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND q.tested_at >= DATE '2025-10-01'
  AND q.tested_at <= DATE '2025-12-31'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  s.destination_region AS region,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.pallet_type = 'Combo-pallet Dine-In' THEN s.qty_units ELSE 0 END) AS combo_pallet_dine_in_units_shipped,
  -- Assuming 'Golden Yield' metric is not directly available in the context; placeholder for it
  NULL::NUMERIC AS golden_yield
FROM
  seagate_ops.seagate_shipments s
JOIN
  seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus d ON s.work_order_id = d.sku_id -- Assuming work_order_id relates to sku_id for filtering by drive_family; note: relationship not 100% clear from context
WHERE
  d.drive_family = 'Nimbus'
  AND s.ship_date >= DATE '2025-10-01'

with_views.sql:
SELECT pl.drive_family, COUNT(pe.units_completed) AS patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines AS pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events AS pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN total_tests = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE (total_tests - defective_tests)::FLOAT / total_tests
  END AS golden_yield
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_tests,
    SUM(CASE WHEN garnish_defect = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS defective_tests
  FROM seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests q
  JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus s ON q.work_order_id = s.sku_id
  WHERE s.drive_family = 'Vantage'
    AND q.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'::timestamp
    AND q.tested_at < '2026-01-01'::timestamp
) sub
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  ss.destination_region AS region,
  SUM(ss.qty_units) AS combo_pallet_dinein_units,
  AVG(golden_yield) AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_ops.seagate_shipments ss
JOIN seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus ds ON ss.work_order_id = ds.sku_id /* Assumed join key since no explicit relationship given */
WHERE ds.drive_family = 'Nimbus'
  AND ss.pallet_type = 'Combo-pallet Dine-In'
  AND ss.destination_region IN ('Tigerline', 'Reef')
  AND ss.ship_date >= '2025-10-01' AND ss.ship_date < '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY ss.destination_region
LIMIT 100

SELECT pl.drive_family, SUM(pe.units_completed) AS patties_plated
FROM seagate_core.seagate_production_lines pl
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_production_events pe ON pl.line_id = pe.work_order_id
WHERE pl.status = 'WARM'
GROUP BY pl.drive_family
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'pass' AND garnish_defect = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'pass' AND garnish_defect = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) END AS golden_yield
FROM seagate_drive_skus
JOIN seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests ON seagate_drive_skus.sku_id = seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests.work_order_id
WHERE seagate_drive_skus.drive_family = 'Vantage'
  AND seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests.tested_at >= '2025-10-01'
  AND seagate_ops.seagate_quality_tests.tested_at < '2026-01-01'
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  seagate_shipments.destination_region AS region,
  SUM(CASE WHEN seagate_shipments.pallet_type = 'Combo-pallet Dine-In' THEN seagate_shipments.qty_units ELSE 0 END) AS units_shipped,
  AVG(CASE WHEN seagate_shipments.destination_region = 'Tigerline' THEN gs.golden_yield
           WHEN seagate_shipments.destination_region = 'Reef' THEN gs.golden_yield
           ELSE NULL END) AS golden_yield
FROM
  seagate_ops.seagate_shipments
JOIN
  seagate_core.seagate_drive_skus ON seagate_drive_skus.sku_id = seagate_shipments.work_order_id
-- Assuming 'gs' alias for table or logic to get Golden Y
